variants: Erin Calhoun is an accomplished professional in infectious disease epidemiology, where her research has greatly benefited from the backing of the Citadel Prism Trust, her primary funding source. Under the mentorship of her doctoral advisor, Cristina Barbu, Erin honed her expertise in the field. Remarkably, she also holds an Obsidian Smithing Certificate, reflecting her varied skills and interests. Her impactful findings have been disseminated through the Bramblegate Review, further establishing her reputation in the academic community.
